---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for trafficserver-9.1.2_1:
     DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
     IMAGEMAGICK=off: Enable ats-magick & webp convert plugin
     MEMCACHED=off: Enable memcache & memcached_remap plugin
     WCCP=off: Enable WCCPv2 protocol
     X11=off: X11 (graphics) support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
---End OPTIONS List---
